mhci_program_timeline.aka: Online Master of Human Computer Interaction
mhci_program_timeline.deadlines_resource: Fall 2025, Spring 2026, and Summer 2026 graduation deadline dates

steps.title: ACADEMIC PLAN COMMITTEE (APC)
steps.details: MHCI distance students have one committee member: the HCI Program Director, Cody Fleming.
steps.status: Task is already completed for all MHCI students upon completion of their first semester.
steps.next_action: Begin working on the Academic Plan task.

steps.title: ACADEMIC PLAN
steps.description: List of courses taken and planned to meet degree requirements (10 courses/30 credits).
steps.deadline: Must be approved by the semester/term before graduation.
steps.when_to_complete: As soon as the AP Committee has been approved.

transfer_credits.process_name: Add External Transfer Credits to Your Graduate Academic Plan

steps.warning: STOP: Do not complete Step #3 until you receive notification that your academic plan has been approved.

steps.title: APPLY FOR PROGRAM COMPLETION
steps.description: Application for the intended semester/term of graduation.
steps.data_entry_note: Date entered should be the last date of the graduation semester. Contact Tiffany if unknown.

steps.title: COURSEWORK ONLY FINAL CHECK
steps.description: Final check that student has completed all courses on their Academic Plan.

post_completion.message: Congratulations on your academic achievement in completing your Master of Human Computer Interaction degree!
post_completion.resources: Information on ceremony and diploma distribution found on Graduation & Commencement website.
